# Here Comes Bitcoin

> Here Comes Bitcoin (herecomesbitcoin.org) is the central resource for all things Bitcoin (puppet, not currency) — over 160 license-free, open-source illustrated character assets: PNGs, SVGs, animated GIFs, coloring pages, and sticker sets, free for any purpose, no attribution required.

The site features a lovable caricatured Bitcoin puppet character illustrated in 130+ unique scenarios and styles. Created by Spiral (a Bitcoin-focused subsidiary of Block, Inc.) and supported by HRF, OpenSats, and SHAmory. Everything on this site is completely open-source and license-free.

## Site Structure

The site is a single-page application. Page sections appear in the following order top to bottom.

### Header

Sticky top navigation bar with the Here Comes Bitcoin logo and two call-to-action buttons.

- [Collaborate](mailto:hello@herecomesbitcoin.org): Reach out for partnerships or custom work
- [Join Discord](https://discord.gg/BChUGPzS5U): Community Discord server

### Hero — "Bitcoin Stuff for Your Bitcoin Stuff"

The landing section. Introduces the site as the central resource for Bitcoin puppet creative assets — all license-free, usable for anything. A "Shop Now" button scrolls users to the Product Showcase section.

### Illustrations — "Your Project, Our Assets"

The main asset gallery. 160+ Bitcoin character illustrations each available as both PNG and SVG. Includes a "Download All" button that downloads every illustration as a ZIP file.

- [Full Asset Catalog JSON](/api/assets): Machine-readable JSON manifest listing every asset with direct download URLs, categories, and available formats. Use this to programmatically discover and fetch assets.
- [Illustration files folder](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/): Direct folder access to all character PNGs and SVGs.

Each illustration is available at:
- PNG: `/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/{name}.png`
- SVG: `/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/{name}.svg`

Individual characters (PNG + SVG unless noted):

- [Bitcoin Acrobat](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/acrobat.png): Bitcoin puppet performing circus acrobatic stunts
- [Bitcoin Alien](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/alien.png): Bitcoin puppet dressed as a space alien
- [American Gothic Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/American-gothic-bitcoin.png): Bitcoin puppet parody of Grant Wood's American Gothic painting
- [Bitcoin Anime](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Anime.png): Bitcoin puppet drawn in Japanese anime art style
- [Anti Credit Card Cat](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Anti-credit-card-cat.png): Cat Bitcoin puppet holding a sign opposing credit cards
- [Bitcoin Astrology](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Astrology.png): Bitcoin puppet surrounded by astrological zodiac symbols
- [Bitcoin Astronaut](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Astronaut.png): Bitcoin puppet in a full astronaut spacesuit
- [ATL BitLab Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/ATL-bitLab-bitcoin.png): Bitcoin puppet in Atlanta BitLab Bitcoin hackerspace branding
- [Bablo Bicasso](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Bablo-bicasso.png): Bitcoin puppet as Pablo Picasso painting in cubist art style
- [Bad Doctor Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Bad-doctor.png): Bitcoin puppet as a shady or incompetent doctor
- [Baghetti](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Baghetti.png): Bitcoin puppet gleefully eating a giant bowl of spaghetti
- [Balance Bitty](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/balancebitty.png): Bitcoin puppet sitting balanced on a scale
- [Banjo Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Banjo-bitcoin.png): Bitcoin puppet strumming a banjo
- [Banker Attack](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Banker-attack.png): Bitcoin puppet fighting off a suited banker character
- [Bannerman Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Bannerman-bitcoin.png): Bitcoin puppet proudly carrying a banner or flag
- [Basketball Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/basketball.png): Bitcoin puppet playing basketball
- [Beach Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/beach.png): Bitcoin puppet relaxing on a sunny beach
- [Bedford Football Club](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/bedford-football-club.png): Bitcoin puppet in Bedford Football Club team kit
- [Bedford Football Club II](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/bedford-football-club-II.png): Bitcoin puppet in Bedford Football Club kit, alternate design
- [Beefcake Bitkey](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Beefcake-bitkey.png): Muscular beefcake Bitcoin puppet in Bitkey hardware wallet branding
- [Bitcoin Beholder](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Beholder.png): Bitcoin puppet as the classic D&D Beholder monster with many eyes
- [BIP177 Bitty](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/bip177bitty.png): Bitcoin puppet themed around the Bitcoin BIP-177 proposal
- [Bird Feeder Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Bird-feeder-bitcoin.png): Bitcoin puppet tending to a garden bird feeder
- [Bitaxe](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/bitaxe.png): Bitcoin puppet themed around the Bitaxe open-source mining hardware
- [Bitcoin Alby](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Bitcoin-Alby.png): Bitcoin puppet in Alby Lightning wallet branding
- [Bitcoin Faucet](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Bitcoin-faucet.png): Bitcoin puppet as a dripping faucet dispensing Bitcoin
- [Bitcoin Island](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Bitcoin-island.png): Bitcoin puppet relaxing on a deserted tropical island
- [Bitcoin Japan](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/bitcoin-japan.png): Bitcoin puppet in Japanese cultural aesthetic and styling
- [Bitcoin Standard](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/bitcoin-standard.png): Bitcoin puppet parody of The Bitcoin Standard book cover
- [Bitcoin Breezeborn](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Bitcoin-the-breezeborn.png): Bitcoin puppet as a wind elemental breezeborn fantasy creature
- [Bitcoin Unit 01](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Bitcoin-unit-01.png): Bitcoin puppet in Unit-01 mecha style from Neon Genesis Evangelion
- [Bitcoin Bahama](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Bitcoinbahama.png): Bitcoin puppet on a tropical Bahamas vacation
- [Bitty vs Dollar](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/bittyversusdollar.png): Bitcoin puppet in a battle against a US dollar bill character
- [Bitty vs Lobster](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/bittyversuslobster.png): Bitcoin puppet fighting a giant lobster
- [Black Ops Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/black-ops.png): Bitcoin puppet in military black ops tactical gear and balaclava
- [Blowhole Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/blowhole-bitcoin.png): Bitcoin puppet as a whale spouting water from a blowhole
- [Boltface Voltage Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Boltface-voltage-bitcoin.png): Bitcoin puppet with a lightning bolt face, Lightning Network themed
- [Bones Bitty](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/bonesbitty.png): Bitcoin puppet as a skeleton in bones and skull costume
- [Bitcoin Brink](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Brink.png): Bitcoin puppet in Brink.dev open-source Bitcoin development branding
- [Brrr Cat](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Brrr-cat.png): Cat Bitcoin puppet referencing the money printer go brrr inflation meme
- [Bthulu Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Bthulu-bitcoin.png): Bitcoin puppet as Cthulhu, the H.P. Lovecraft cosmic horror deity
- [Btrust Bitty](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/btrustbitty.png): Bitcoin puppet in Btrust Bitcoin developer grants fund branding
- [Bucolic Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Bucolic-bitcoin.png): Bitcoin puppet in a peaceful pastoral countryside scene
- [Buff Bitty](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/buffbitty.png): Extremely muscular bodybuilder Bitcoin puppet flexing
- [Bushido Bitty](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/bushidob.png): Bitcoin puppet as a samurai warrior in feudal Japanese armor
- [Bust Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Bust-bitcoin.png): Bitcoin puppet as a classical marble or bronze bust sculpture
- [Bitcoin Cat](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Cat.png): Bitcoin puppet styled as a house cat
- [Cat Two](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/cat-two.png): Bitcoin puppet as a second cat character variant
- [Cat Flap Bitty](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/catflapbitty.png): Bitcoin puppet squeezing through a cat door flap
- [Claw Machine Bitty](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/clawmachineittybitty.png): Bitcoin puppet trapped inside an arcade claw machine
- [Bitcoin Coder](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Coder.png): Bitcoin puppet as a programmer typing at a computer
- [Cold Card Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Cold-card.png): Bitcoin puppet in Coldcard hardware wallet branding
- [Confused Cat](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Confused-cat.png): Cat Bitcoin puppet with a baffled and confused expression
- [Consensus Cleanup](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Consensus-cleanup.png): Bitcoin puppet themed around the Bitcoin consensus cleanup soft fork
- [Bitcoin Construction](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Construction.png): Bitcoin puppet wearing a hard hat and construction worker gear
- [Couch Dweller](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Couch-dweller.png): Bitcoin puppet lounging lazily on a couch
- [Bitcoin Count](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/count.png): Bitcoin puppet as Count Dracula in a vampire cape
- [Cozy Little Guy](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Cozy-little-guy.png): Bitcoin puppet bundled up cozily in warm clothes
- [Da Boy Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Da-boy-bitcoin.png): Bitcoin puppet as a cool street-style youth character
- [Bitcoin Dad](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Dad.png): Bitcoin puppet dressed as a stereotypical dad
- [DnD Bitty Crew](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/dandbittycrew.png): Group of Bitcoin puppets as a Dungeons and Dragons adventuring party
- [Disgusting Brunch Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Disgusting-brunch-bitcoin.png): Bitcoin puppet at an over-the-top lavish brunch spread

- [Dragon Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/dragon.png): Bitcoin puppet transformed into a fire-breathing dragon

- [Eldritch Meow](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Eldritch-meow.png): Cat Bitcoin puppet as a tentacled cosmic eldritch horror

- [Bitcoin Fancy](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/fancy.png): Bitcoin puppet dressed in extravagant formal attire

- [Flower God](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Flower-god.png): Bitcoin puppet as a nature deity crowned with blooming flowers
- [Forest God](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Forest-god.png): Bitcoin puppet as a forest spirit deity surrounded by trees

- [Bitcoin Graffiti](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Graffiti.png): Bitcoin puppet rendered as bold street graffiti spray-paint art
- [Bitcoin Greenpeace](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Greenpeace.png): Bitcoin puppet in Greenpeace environmental protest branding
- [Greetings Cat](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Greetings-cat.png): Cat Bitcoin puppet waving cheerfully in a greeting pose

- [Bitcoin Hamlet](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Hamlet.png): Bitcoin puppet as Shakespeare's Hamlet holding a skull

- [Honey Badger Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Honey-badger-bitcoin.png): Bitcoin puppet as a fearless honey badger referencing the don't care meme
- [Hooray Cat](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Hooray-cat.png): Cat Bitcoin puppet with arms raised in joyful celebration
- [Hot Air Balloon Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/hot-air-balloon.png): Bitcoin puppet soaring in a hot air balloon
- [HRF Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/HRF.png): Bitcoin puppet in Human Rights Foundation branding and colors
- [Bitcoin Hungry](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/hungry.png): Bitcoin puppet with a wide-open hungry mouth ready to eat

- [In-Person Discourse](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/In-person-discourse.png): Two Bitcoin puppets engaged in heated face-to-face debate
- [Itty Bitty Baseball](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/ittybittybaseball.png): Tiny Bitcoin puppet playing baseball in full uniform
- [Jack Mallers Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/jack-mallers.png): Bitcoin puppet caricature of Jack Mallers, founder and CEO of Strike

- [Bitcoin Judge](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Judge.png): Bitcoin puppet in judge's robes, wig, and holding a gavel

- [Legendary Fighter Bitty](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/legendaryfighterbitty.png): Bitcoin puppet as a legendary fighting game character in battle stance
- [Lightning Network](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/lightning-network.png): Bitcoin puppet themed around the Bitcoin Lightning Network payment layer
- [Lyn Alden Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Lyn-Alden.png): Bitcoin puppet caricature of Lyn Alden, macroeconomist and Bitcoin author
- [Maid Cafe Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/maidcafebitcoin.png): Bitcoin puppet in a Japanese maid cafe frilly apron costume
- [Manga Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/manga.png): Bitcoin puppet drawn in Japanese manga comic book style
- [Meow Cheeks](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Meow-cheeks.png): Cat Bitcoin puppet with exaggerated chubby cheeks
- [Metal Band Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/metal-band.png): Bitcoin puppet as a heavy metal rock band performer
- [Bitcoin Miner](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Miner.png): Bitcoin puppet as a Bitcoin miner with a pickaxe
- [Bitcoin Mirror](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Mirror.png): Bitcoin puppet gazing at its own reflection in a mirror
- [Moe Bitty Us Strip](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/moebittyusstrip.png): Bitcoin puppet in a moe-style comic strip panel layout
- [Bitcoin Mrs](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/mrs.png): Bitcoin puppet styled as a Mrs. or female character
- [Murder Mystery Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/murdermystery.png): Bitcoin puppet characters at a murder mystery dinner party
- [Mythology Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/mythology.png): Bitcoin puppet depicted in ancient Greek or Roman mythology style
- [Night Out Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/night-out.png): Bitcoin puppet dressed up for a glamorous night on the town
- [Bitcoin Nostrich](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Nostrich.png): Bitcoin puppet as an ostrich referencing the Nostr protocol mascot
- [Online Discourse](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Online-discourse.png): Bitcoin puppet characters arguing in an online social media thread
- [OpenSats Arrow](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/opensats-arrow.png): Bitcoin puppet in OpenSats Bitcoin grants organization branding
- [Orange Man](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Orange-man.png): Bitcoin puppet as an intensely orange man character
- [Panic At The Meow](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Panic-at-the-meow.png): Cat Bitcoin puppet in a Panic! at the Disco band parody
- [Pet Adoption Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Pet-adoption.png): Bitcoin puppet choosing a pet at an animal adoption center
- [Planet Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/planet.png): Bitcoin puppet floating near a ringed planet in outer space
- [Pollock Bitty](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/pollockbitty.png): Bitcoin puppet in the chaotic drip-painting style of Jackson Pollock
- [Presidio One](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/presidio-one.png): Bitcoin puppet in Presidio-themed illustration, first variant
- [Presidio Two](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/presidio-two.png): Bitcoin puppet in Presidio-themed illustration, second variant
- [Prrrroto Cat](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Prrrroto-cat.png): Cat Bitcoin puppet as a Bitcoin protocol developer
- [Bitcoin Pubkey](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Pubkey.png): Bitcoin puppet presenting a cryptographic public key
- [Puppet Jack](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/puppet-jack.png): Bitcoin puppet operating as a hand puppet named Jack
- [Bitcoin Pyro](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Pyro.png): Bitcoin puppet as a fire-wielding pyromaniac surrounded by flames
- [Bitcoin Queen](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Queen.png): Bitcoin puppet in royal queen crown and regalia
- [Register Cat](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Register-cat.png): Cat Bitcoin puppet operating a cash register
- [Bitcoin Robe](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Robe.png): Bitcoin puppet draped in a flowing ceremonial robe
- [Rockstar Dev](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/rockstar-dev.png): Bitcoin puppet as a guitar-shredding rockstar software developer
- [Roman Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/roman.png): Bitcoin puppet in ancient Roman toga and laurel wreath
- [Bitcoin Sandwich](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Sandwich.png): Bitcoin puppet enthusiastically eating a giant sandwich
- [Bitcoin Satoshi](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Satoshi.png): Bitcoin puppet as a tribute to Satoshi Nakamoto, the anonymous Bitcoin creator
- [SHAmory Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/SHAmory.png): Bitcoin puppet in SHAmory Bitcoin education memory card game branding
- [Bitcoin Sir](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/sir.png): Bitcoin puppet as a dapper English gentleman in top hat and monocle

- [Solar Powered Meow](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Solar-powered-meow.png): Cat Bitcoin puppet running on solar panel power
- [Bitcoin Sorceress](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Sorceress.png): Bitcoin puppet as a powerful sorceress casting a spell
- [Stacker News](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/stacker-news.png): Bitcoin puppet in Stacker News community forum branding
- [Student Network](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Student-network.png): Bitcoin puppet as a student or educator in an academic network
- [Summer Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/summer.png): Bitcoin puppet in bright summer vacation attire
- [Summoning The Circle](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Summoning-the-circle.png): Bitcoin puppet performing a mystical ritual summoning circle
- [Bitcoin Super](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/super.png): Bitcoin puppet as a caped superhero in flight
- [Bitcoin Surfer](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/surfer.png): Bitcoin puppet riding a cresting ocean wave on a surfboard

- [Bitcoin Sushi](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Sushi.png): Bitcoin puppet as or serving Japanese sushi
- [The Sun Soaker](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/The-sun-soaker.png): Bitcoin puppet sunbathing and soaking up warm sunrays

- [THNDR Games](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/THNDR-games.png): Bitcoin puppet in THNDR Bitcoin mobile gaming platform branding

- [Tokyo Streetwear Bittys](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/tokyostreetwearbittys.png): Bitcoin puppets styled in Tokyo street fashion and streetwear
- [Bitcoin Triceratops](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Triceratops.png): Bitcoin puppet as a three-horned triceratops dinosaur

- [Bitcoin Unicorn](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Unicorn.png): Bitcoin puppet as a magical rainbow unicorn with a horn

- [Zeus Bitcoin](/assets/HereComesBitcoinAssets/Zeus-bitcoin.png): Bitcoin puppet as Zeus, Greek god of thunder, wielding a lightning bolt

### Sticker Set — "Make Chats Stickier"

Here Comes Bitcoin sticker bundles for Signal and Telegram, featuring Bitcoin puppet characters for use in private messaging apps.

- [Telegram Sticker Pack](https://t.me/addstickers/herecomesbitcoin)
- [Signal Sticker Pack](https://signal.art/addstickers/#pack_id=8fa42aa13ec8f0efebe4b038f41afbd1&pack_key=ef7c64b27126e1fed904c2ccaacf78d312a3f8dd846cd2e146c749fe2e51f335)
- [Sticker Preview Images](/assets/StrickerSetImages/): PNG preview images of the sticker set

### GIFs — "The Perfect Gif"

12 animated GIFs of the Bitcoin puppet character, free to use and share anywhere.

- [All GIF Files](/assets/HereComesBitconGifs/): Direct folder access to all 12 animated GIFs
- [Giphy Library](https://giphy.com/herecomesbitcoin): Full GIF library on Giphy

### Partners — "Partners in Code"

Bitcoin-aligned organizations that have partnered with Here Comes Bitcoin. Brands good for Bitcoin can get in touch about custom sticker partnerships.

- [SHAmory](https://shamory.com): Bitcoin education card game
- [HRF – Human Rights Foundation](https://hrf.org): Promoting freedom globally with Bitcoin
- [OpenSats](https://opensats.org): Supporting Bitcoin open-source development

### Products — "Here Comes Your Bitcoin"

Physical merchandise featuring the Here Comes Bitcoin character. Presented as a swipeable card carousel.

- [Here Comes Bitcoin Plushie — $39.99](https://www.uncute.com/collections/all/products/here-comes-bitcoin)
- [The 21M Faces of Bitcoin Mug — $15.00](https://www.spiralswag.xyz/product/the-21m-faces-of-bitcoin-mug/4?cp=true&sa=true&sbp=false&q=false)
- [Here Comes Bitcoin Satscard — $8.99](https://store.coinkite.com/store/sc-hcb-1)

### Video — "Who is Bitcoin?"

Embedded YouTube short film answering the age-old question: "Who is Bitcoin?" Many have asked "What is Bitcoin?" — few have dared ask "Who is Bitcoin?"

- [Watch "Who is Bitcoin?" on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DvHUOr8ruMw)

### Coloring Pages — "Farts and Crafts"

Printable Bitcoin puppet coloring pages. Download, print, color, and share. Kids and adults alike.

- [Coloring Pages Folder](/assets/ColoringCardsImages/): Direct folder access to all coloring page PNGs
  - `ColoringCardOne.png` — Main Here Comes Bitcoin coloring page
  - `coloringCard2.png` — Up Top, Bitcoin!
  - `coloringCard3.png` — Super Strong Amazing Very Muscles Bitcoin
  - `coloringCard4.png` — Hungry Hungry Bitcoin
  - `coloringCard5.png` — Oh, Bitcoin! Not Again!

### Footer

Links, social channels, and contact information. License: No Copyright — Make Whatever You Want.

- [Contact Us](mailto:hello@herecomesbitcoin.org): For shop support, business, and licensing enquiries
- [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@herecomesbitcoin): Here Comes Bitcoin YouTube channel
- [Discord](https://discord.gg/BChUGPzS5U): Community Discord server
- [Usage Guidelines](https://x.com/spiralbtc/status/1788239963626123600/): How to use the assets
- [Built with HCB](/built-with-hcb): Projects and sites built using Here Comes Bitcoin assets

## API

- [GET /api/assets](/api/assets): Machine-readable JSON manifest of all site assets. Returns total asset count, categories (illustrations, gifs, coloring-pages, sticker-sets), format availability (PNG, SVG, GIF), and fully-qualified direct download URLs for every asset. CORS-enabled and publicly accessible.

## Optional

- [Spiral](https://spiral.xyz): Creator of Here Comes Bitcoin — a Bitcoin-focused subsidiary of Block, Inc.
- [OpenSats](https://opensats.org): Supports Bitcoin open-source development; a founding partner of this project
- [HRF – Human Rights Foundation](https://hrf.org): Promotes freedom globally using Bitcoin; a founding partner of this project
- [SHAmory](https://shamory.com): Bitcoin education card game; a founding partner of this project
- [Giphy](https://giphy.com/herecomesbitcoin): Full Here Comes Bitcoin GIF library hosted on Giphy
